name: Mushroom Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the lettuce.
2. Break into large pieces.
3. Peel and slice cucumber into 1/4" slices.
4. Peel and slice cucumber into 1/4" slices (repeat).
5. Rinse green beans; cut beans into 1-inch pieces.
6. Place greens, cucumber, and beans into a plastic bag or tightly covered container.
7. Store in the refrigerator for 4 to 6 hours or overnight to crisp up.
8. Trim mushroom stems to 1/4 inch of the cap.
9. Cut mushrooms if they are discolored; cut mushrooms into thin slices.
10. Just before serving, carefully pat greens, cucumber, and beans dry on a towel.
11. Place in a wooden bowl; cover with French dressing.
12. Toss lightly to coat all ingredients with dressing.
13. Top with mushrooms.
